target_network_features.urban_comfort_index: This index combines environmental and amenity factors to assess urban comfort.
target_network_features.community_safety_index: This index focuses on community safety by emphasizing security and police presence, along with social facilities.
target_network_features.城市更新潜力指数: 该指数通过分析空置建筑、公共建筑、社区中心和停车场的密度，识别出城市中最有潜力进行更新的区域。
